Table summary.
File name: source-materials/bylaws/Constitution, Bylaws, and Covenant 2018.pdf. Type of document: Bylaws / covenant source. Purpose: Provide current governance authority for officer, committee, and church approval questions.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Congregation, Pastor, Deacons, Nominating Committee, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Surfaced in the site through docs/governance/constitution-and-bylaws-reference.md; confirm this is the current authoritative bylaws version..
